title: FOREWORD
content: The modern University is a multi-varsity, a community of many professionals and students, drawn from varied cultural backgrounds. Some rules and regulations are necessary to guide behaviour within such a community, promote harmony, check excesses and ensure an atmosphere conducive for the achievement of the goals for which the University is set up.

This Student Handbook is the students' companion and guide throughout your stay in the University. It sets out the rules pertaining to virtually all aspects of a student's life on campus, right from the day you gain admission into the University till the day you graduate. The University graduates only those students who have met its requirements in character and learning.

Students are therefore strongly advised to read this book thoroughly, for ignorance of the law is not an excuse especially for University students. There may be other rules of specific nature not covered by this book. Such rules are as important as those contained herein. On behalf of the Governing Council, Senate and Staff, I welcome and wish you a successful studentship in the University.
